## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass (`pip install ruff`)
- [ ] Python files compile (`python -m py_compile <file>`)
- [ ] JSON configs valid
- [ ] No secrets or workspace-specific URLs committed
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Tested locally (or on a Modal deploy)
